EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IAnimationProgressor

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that report progress using an animation.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("80CB7E35-85E4-11D1-872C-0000F8751720")]
public interface IAnimationProgressor : IProgressor

Properties

Animation

The animation displayed by the progressor as one of the esriAnimation constants. (Not implemented).

esriAnimations Animation { get; set; }

Property Value

esriAnimations

Examples

Sample Snippet

Message 

string Message { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Methods

Hide() 

void Hide()

OpenPath(string)

Opens the AVI file specified in the path and displays its first frame. The AVI file specified must not contain audio.

void OpenPath(string animationPath)

Parameters

animationPath string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Play(int, int, int)

Plays the animation.

void Play(int frameFrom = 0, int frameTo = -1, int repeat = -1)

Parameters

frameFrom int
frameTo int
repeat int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Seek(int)

Moves to the specified frame of the animation. The animation starts at this frame the next time it is played.

void Seek(int frameTo)

Parameters

frameTo int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Show() 

void Show()

Step() 

void Step()

Stop()

Stops the animation.

void Stop()
